titleStmt.title: SII 7.402: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 402. (A.R. No. 192 of 1901). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti ci . koṟcaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamum koṇṭaruḷiya śrīcuntara
pāṇṭiyatevaṟkku(y) yāṇṭu patiṉoṉṟāvatukku Etirāmāṇṭai Āṭimātam Irupattueḻān tiyati ceyaṅkoRead ceyaṅkoṇṭaṇṭa(ṇṭa)coḻa
maṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukāṭṭukkoṭṭattu tiraiyaṉūrāṉa śrīkolottuṅkacoḻacaturppetimaṅkalattu mācapaiyom Uṭaiyār tiruvaṉa
nticcuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āṇṭārcattiyatevar muṉṉāḷ ceyta tarmmakkāriyattukku perumāṉmutalikaḷil Uṭaiyar Ati
yamāṉār tirumuṉnāka nāṭavar tiraṇṭu Iruntu keṭṭu Ikkāriyattukku Uṭaiyār tiruvaṉanticcuramuṭaiya nā
yaṉāṟkku tevatāṉa(m)māka Ikkoyil niyātittār Eṅkaḷpakkal tu nilakkāṇiyāka muṉṉāḷil koṇṭu Uṭaiya nila
ttile vi kaṭavatāka niccayitta nilam Eḻuveliiṉāl pāṭakam nāṟpattiraṇṭukku vaṭak lai Uttamacoḻavatikku teṟkku
mummuṭicoḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku 8- kuḻi 2- catirattu vāṇarāyaṉmuttai pāṭakam Oṉṟum vatikku kiḻakku 7- kuḻi
muṉṟāñ catirattu ceḻiyataraiyaṉ kūrattāṉ pāṭakam 1�- lum 6- catirattu kiḷimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ kallaṉ pāṭakam 1va�- lum
kaṭamparāyaṉ kallaṉ pāṭakam 1va- lum 8- kuḻi 3- catirattu kāṅkaiyaṉ kallaṉ pāṭakam Oṉṟum makatarāyaṉ kallaṉ paāṭ(ā)kam Oṉṟum
2- catirattu virakaṅkaṉ kaṟiamutuvaṭṭam pāṭakam 1- m vāṇarāyaṉ kaṟiamutu(pa)vaṭṭam pāṭakam 1- m Ammaiappamārāyaṉ
kaṟiyamutuvaṭṭam pāṭakam 1- m kāṅkaiyaṉ pallāpurattānum Akkārakuṇṭilum pāṭakam kan tataka [1- kuḻi] 5- catirattu nāccikkaḻuval pāṭakam 1- m 10- kuḻi 6- catirattu I
ruṅkoḷan Ettacceṟu pāṭakam 1- m nallāḷ Ettacceṟu pāṭakam �-m 10- kuḻi 4- catirattu kāliṅkarāyaṉ moṇvāymukkar pāṭakam n=ta- m Araciṅka ṟṟuvatikku kiḻakku mummuṭicoḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku 1- kuḻi 6- catirattu campantaṉ cāntūrāṉa naṭuvaṭaipāṭakam Oṉṟum 2- kuḻi 1- catirattu tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉ pāṭakam Oṉṟum mātirippiḷḷai pāṭakam Oṉṟum 8- catirattu tiruppukkuḻivaṭṭam pāṭakam Oṉṟum 2- kuḻi 5- catirattu naraciṅkapaṉmar coṉmukkar pāṭakam n=ta- lum nantipaṉmaṉ � pāṭakam catirattu naraciṅkapaṉma m 1va- m mutali pāṭakam 1va- m 3- kuḻi 5- catirattu Apayattāṉ pāṭakam Arai celvapeṇ [pāṭa] kam 1- m 4- kuḻi 8
catirattu Āvattaṉ Āṇṭāṉvaṭṭam pāṭakam Oṉṟum [2- kuḻi] 8- catirattu Āvattaṉ Irutaḷaiyaṉ pāṭakam Oṉṟum 4- kuḻi 7- catirattu tiruppukkuḻi Uppūrāṉ ga kaṉapaṭṭapiḷḷai Āvattaṉ Uppūrā yum 6- catirattu piritiyaṅkaraiyaṉ pāṭakam 2- ṇṭum vattarāyaṉpāṭakam Oṉṟum vaṭivuṭaiyāḷ pāṭakam Oṉṟum 5- catirattu kāḷattiāṇṭār pāṭakam Oṉṟum 4- catirattu tāḻippiḷḷaipāṭakam mukkālum makatarāyan Arumpāṭakam Oṉṟekālum 5- kuḻi 4- catirattu naṉtipaṉmaṉ Attimu 1 nta- m 6- catirattu Atiyamāṉ teṟkaṭaiya pāṭakam 1�- m 6- kuḻi 8- catirattu paḷḷiaṟaiṉācci pāṭakam 1- m 7- catirattu Irāciṅkapaṉmaṉ pāṭakam 1- m 6- catirattu pe
rumāṇāyan pāṭakam 1- m tevāṇṭai pāṭakam 1- m 5- catirattu Āṇṭār Īcāṉatevar pāṭakam 1- m Aṟamaḷattāṉ pāṭakam Araiyum Ākap pāṭakam nāṟpattiraṇṭum Iṉnāyaṉārkku kuṭinīṅkāttevatāṉamāka viṭṭom Iṉnilattāl varum tiruvātiraineyyum Iṉnāyaṉārkku Āṭiaruḷa viṭṭom tiraiyaṉūrāṉa śrīkulottuṅkacoḻacaturvve timaṅgalattu ma hāsabhai yom Ippaṭikku Ivai paṇiyāl tiraiyaṉū(r)ruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu �
Digital edition of SII 7.402 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
